# rfe.submit

Push RFEs to Jira via REST API. Creates new RHAIRFE tickets or
updates existing ones, renames local files after submission.

**Plugin**: [rfe-creator](index.md) | **:material-check: User-invocable**

## Diagram

</div>

## Usage

```
/rfe.submit
```
